# seo_rat

> Open-source SEO toolkit for markdown-based static sites (Astro, Quarto, nbdev).

## Docs

- [API Reference](https://abdelkareemkobo.github.io/seo_rat/apilist.txt)

## Optional

- [GSC Storage](https://abdelkareemkobo.github.io/seo_rat/05_gsc_storage.html.md)
- [SEO Report](https://abdelkareemkobo.github.io/seo_rat/09_seo_report.html.md)
